name: SAS Fraud Management
description: Enterprise fraud detection platform that combines real-time transaction scoring, adaptive machine learning, network analytics, and alert management to detect and prevent financial fraud across all channels.
elevatorPitch: Real-time fraud detection that learns and adapts — protecting billions of transactions daily with <10ms scoring.
capabilities: Adaptive machine learning models that evolve with fraud patterns
Network/graph analytics for organized fraud ring detection
Multi-channel coverage (cards, digital payments, mobile, ATM)
Alert management and case investigation workflows
targetBuyer: Chief Risk Officer, Head of Fraud Operations, CISO, Head of Compliance
phUseCases: Credit card transaction fraud (BDO, BPI, Metrobank)
